description: A forklift operator accidentally damages a pallet of goods in the warehouse. The damaged items must be adjusted out of inventory.

nodes.task_description: The operator reports the damage incident, specifying the item, location, and quantity damaged.

expected_outcome.expected: A damage report is created in the system.

nodes.task_description: A supervisor reviews the report and approves the inventory adjustment.
Process an inventory adjustment to remove the damaged quantity from stock, using 'Warehouse Damage' as the reason.

expected_outcome.expected: The system inventory is updated to reflect the loss.
